debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
g'_diff : Differentiable ℝ g'
g'_cont : Continuous g'
⊢ Continuous g''

failed_attempts:
unfold interpolated_deriv2
    apply continuous_finset_sum; intro i _
    apply continuous_finset_sum; intro j _
    apply Continuous.mul (by fun_prop)
    apply Continuous.comp _ g₀_diff.continuous
    exact ((fc.contDiff_partial j).contDiff_partial i).continuous

rw [← deriv_interpolated2, ← deriv_interpolated]
    have hg : ContDiff ℝ 2 g := by
      unfold GlobalTheorem.interpolated GlobalTheorem.interpolator
      fun_prop
    exact (hg.deriv (by norm_num)).continuous_deriv (by norm_num)

have h : ∀ i j, Continuous (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) := fun i j ↦
      ((fc.contDiff_nth_partial j (by norm_num)).contDiff_nth_partial i (by norm_num)).continuous
    dsimp [g'', GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2]
    fun_prop

have h : ∀ i, ContDiff ℝ 1 (nth_partial i f) := fun i ↦ fc.partial i
    unfold GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2
    fun_prop

unfold interpolated_deriv2
    have h (i j : Fin n) : Continuous (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) :=
      ((fc.partialDeriv j (by norm_num)).partialDeriv i (by norm_num)).continuous
    fun_prop

unfold interpolated_deriv2
    have h (i j : Fin n) : Continuous (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) := by
      have h1 := fc.contDiff_partialDeriv j (by norm_num)
      have h2 := h1.contDiff_partialDeriv i (by norm_num)
      exact h2.continuous
    fun_prop

unfold interpolated_deriv2
    have h (i j : Fin n) : Continuous (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) :=
      ((fc.partial j).partial i).continuous
    fun_prop

unfold interpolated_deriv2
    refine continuous_finset_sum fun i _ ↦ continuous_finset_sum fun j _ ↦ ?_
    apply Continuous.const_mul
    exact ((fc.partialDeriv j).partialDeriv i).continuous.comp (Differentiable.interpolator x y).continuous
